meta.description: Multi-fund impact investor portfolio directory — agri-food SMEs and cooperatives. sme_id links portfolio companies to the CRS spice SME pipeline (madagascar.json, tanzania.json, uganda.json).

funds.name: Ground Up Investing
funds.portfolio_scope: Full — all 15 publicly listed portfolio companies as of May 2026
funds.notes: Impact-first fund; often first outside investor; flexible capital structures. Arm of Corus International (parent of LWR). Patient/partnership-oriented capital + technical assistance.

funds.name: SIDI
funds.portfolio_scope: Partial — agricultural loans in Sub-Saharan Africa only (24 of ~60+ total SIDI partners). 2 profiles unavailable at time of sourcing: Akuna/Sierra Leone, ECAM/Ivory Coast.
funds.notes: Founded 1983; arm of French Catholic solidarity movement. Finances enterprises considered too risky by mainstream investors. Long-term technical support alongside financial instruments. 76% of agri partners support agroecological practices; 72% Fairtrade certified; 84% organic.

portfolio.business_model: Carbon credit generation + farmer training
portfolio.target_market: Corporate carbon offset buyers; smallholder farmers
portfolio.analyst_notes: Impact venture by Warm Heart Worldwide. Trains smallholders to convert crop waste into biochar and earn C-sink credits.

portfolio.business_model: B2B bioinput supplier + farmer training
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2018; works with 800+ coffee growers; 1,500+ ha treated with regenerative ag.

portfolio.business_model: Smallholder coffee producer; natural processing
portfolio.analyst_notes: Saves ~4.8M litres of water/year. Exported exclusively via Equation Coffee — closely linked entities, potentially one investee group.

portfolio.business_model: B2B aggregator, processor, exporter
portfolio.key_products: Cardamom, ginger, lemongrass, turmeric, allspice, vanilla
portfolio.analyst_notes: US-based HQ with operations in Nicaragua and Honduras. Relevant comparator for CRS Madagascar spice work.

portfolio.business_model: Coffee curator, exporter, distributor
portfolio.key_products: Specialty green coffee (various origins and processes)
portfolio.analyst_notes: Exclusive exporter for Delagua; represents La Palma & El Tucán. Delagua/Equation relationship warrants deduplication flag.

portfolio.business_model: Direct-to-consumer fair trade coffee & chocolate
portfolio.analyst_notes: Impact venture arm of Lutheran World Relief. Church distribution channel is distinctive.

portfolio.business_model: D2C and wholesale organic superfoods
portfolio.key_products: Sacha inchi, cacao, spirulina, macambo, other superfoods
portfolio.analyst_notes: Empowers indigenous farmers across Latin America. Community-centric, regenerative sourcing model.

portfolio.business_model: Vertically integrated bean-to-bar at origin
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer microloan programme; farmers are suppliers not equity owners
portfolio.analyst_notes: Based in Kampala; processes and manufactures at origin.

portfolio.business_model: Smallholder-focused Arabica coffee exporter
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2017; Mt Elgon slopes; income diversification projects underway.

portfolio.business_model: Ultra-premium tree-to-bar chocolate brand
portfolio.key_products: Single-origin luxury dark chocolate (Ancient Nacional cacao)
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Pays up to 700% above market price; long-term farmer relationships; not equity ownership
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2013. Partners with TMA rainforest conservation. Barrel-aged editions up to $385/bar.

portfolio.business_model: Hardware tools + farmer training for coffee sector
portfolio.key_products: Post-harvest coffee tools, digital ag solutions, training kits
portfolio.target_market: Smallholder coffee farmers; cooperatives; development agencies
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2012; 5,000 families impacted; 10,000 trees planted; 580K m³ water saved annually.

portfolio.sourcing_country: Guatemala, Belize, Honduras, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia, Haiti, Dominican Republic, Uganda, Philippines, Vietnam, Thailand, Ghana, Puerto Rico
portfolio.business_model: B2B specialty cacao supply chain company
portfolio.certifications: Organic, Fair Trade (varies by origin); B Corp certified
portfolio.analyst_notes: B Corp; Transparent Trade model; 2,349 female producers in 2024. HIGH deduplication risk — likely to appear in other fund portfolios.

portfolio.business_model: D2C and wholesale coffee-leaf tea brand
portfolio.key_products: Coffee leaf tea (iced and dry formats)
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Nicaraguan farmer Enrique Ferrufino is co-founder with equal equity stake and board director
portfolio.analyst_notes: Best-practice farmer equity model. 140,000+ work hours generated for farming communities.

portfolio.business_model: SaaS platform for Arabic literacy in schools
portfolio.analyst_notes: OUTLIER: Only non-agri investment in Ground Up portfolio. Does not map cleanly to agri schema fields. Handle separately in cross-fund analysis.

portfolio.business_model: Biomass conversion into liquid plant growth promoter
portfolio.analyst_notes: Converts 30,000 kg biomass; enhances 1,500 dunams; 500+ farmers. Interesting parallel to BiocharLife. Lebanon country-risk context.

portfolio.business_model: Farmer-owned cooperative providing inputs, training and market access
portfolio.key_products: Cassava, beans, millet, soybeans, corn, coffee, bananas
portfolio.target_market: Local and regional markets; non-member farmers
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative
portfolio.analyst_notes: Loan

portfolio.business_model: SME aggregator shortening supply chains for vanilla, cloves, paprika, ginger and pulses
portfolio.analyst_notes: MADAGASCAR FLAG: Directly relevant to CRS spice work. Founded 2023 by founders of Madagascar Consulting. Sources from 2,000 producers. Cross-check against Madagascar spice SME directory.

portfolio.business_model: Agricultural raw materials exporter; structuring cooperative union
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Co-founded IBA cooperative union of 1,856+ producers; not farmer equity ownership
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2015; ranked #1 cocoa exporter in Togo 2023–24 season (3,000 tonnes). Partners with Swiss Cocoasource group.

portfolio.business_model: Profile unavailable — server error during fetch
portfolio.analyst_notes: DATA GAP: SIDI profile page returned server error. Re-fetch recommended at next session.

portfolio.business_model: Inclusive-ownership cashew processing SME; first cashew plant in Kolda
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Inclusive shareholder model — producer organisations, AVSF and Ethiquable are shareholders
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2020; first cashew plant in Kolda, one of Senegal's poorest regions. Sources from 500+ producers. Less than 5% of Senegal cashews processed locally.

portfolio.business_model: Family-owned SME collecting and exporting high-quality vanilla via certified cooperatives
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Sources from 2 certified cooperatives representing 800 producers; not farmer equity ownership
portfolio.analyst_notes: MADAGASCAR FLAG: Directly relevant to CRS spice work. Sources from Mananara region — cross-check against Madagascar spice SME directory (Mananara cooperatives entry sme-012 is in the same area).

portfolio.business_model: Medium-sized coffee and cocoa cooperative; Fairtrade and Rainforest Alliance certified
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2006; 84% products certified; geographically distinct from main Ivory Coast cocoa belt.

portfolio.business_model: Aggregator connecting ~4,000 beekeepers to markets; develops high value-added products
portfolio.key_products: Honey, honey vinegar, honey mustard, beeswax candles
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Beekeepers are key suppliers; market access model; not equity ownership
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 1998; 300-year ancestral beekeeping tradition in region. Environmental co-benefit: bee pollination of forests.

portfolio.business_model: Exporter and supply chain structurer for organic soya and cocoa
portfolio.analyst_notes: Sources from 5,000+ producers. Subsidiary of Swiss Gebana AG group. Strong supply chain structuring role including technical training.

portfolio.business_model: Organic cashew nut processor with rigorous traceability and producer premium
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Pays 5% premium above national market price to producers; not equity ownership
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded by Austrians — SIDI flagged non-local management as a deviation from its usual criteria but backed due to strong impact. 50% women beneficiaries.

portfolio.business_model: Arabica coffee cooperative with direct export; Fairtrade and organic certified
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative (1,077 members, 44% women)
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 1998. Women's coffee programme. 31 permanent + ~200 seasonal jobs. One of SIDI's longer-standing partnerships (since 2016).

portfolio.business_model: Arabica coffee cooperative with direct export; Fairtrade and organic certified
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative (2,100+ members, 43% women)
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 1999. Youth and women inclusion programmes. 23 permanent + 254 seasonal jobs. SIDI partner since 2016.

portfolio.business_model: Organic and fair trade Arabica coffee cooperative; exports to Europe via Ethiquable
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative (2,000+ producers)
portfolio.analyst_notes: Operating since 2012; conflict-affected region (South Kivu civil war since 2004). Sells to Ethiquable — same buyer as Fanohana cooperative in Madagascar SME directory. Strong agroecology focus.

portfolio.business_model: Rural agribusiness processing cereals and staple grains; 29 years experience; UNBS certified
portfolio.key_products: Millet, rice, maize, soy, cassava products
portfolio.analyst_notes: 177 employees; 15,739 farmer partners. Largest SIDI beneficiary count in this dataset (16,523). Focuses on nutritious products for local market rather than export.

portfolio.business_model: Largest coffee cooperative union in Uganda; 26 cooperatives; Robusta coffee
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned union of 26 cooperatives (~15,000 members)
portfolio.analyst_notes: SIDI's longest-running agri partnership (since 2011). Prices 11–15% above Ugandan average. Specific gender and youth inclusion programmes.

portfolio.business_model: Farmer-established community enterprise marketing staple crops and strengthening value chains
portfolio.key_products: Corn, seeds, peanuts, cashew nuts, sesame
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Set up in 2003 by organised farmers as a community enterprise
portfolio.analyst_notes: 20,000 producers supported; 6,000 active suppliers. Founded by farmers to counter market domination by large foreign players. Security risk in Cabo Delgado region.

portfolio.business_model: Social enterprise distributing fortified food products (Koba Aina) fighting child malnutrition
portfolio.key_products: Fortified porridge (Koba Aina), chocolate bars, muesli snacks
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Multi-stakeholder model: SIDI, Gret, TAF, and development actors are co-founders/shareholders
portfolio.analyst_notes: MADAGASCAR FLAG: Not a spice/agri-export SME — focus is urban nutrition. 42,000 rations/day; 200+ employees. SIDI is an equity investor (capital financing). Co-founded with Gret and Investisseurs & Partenaires.

portfolio.business_model: Union of 22 cooperatives producing fine aroma cocoa with agroecological practices
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned union of 22 cooperatives (450 members, 24% women)
portfolio.analyst_notes: MADAGASCAR FLAG: Fine/aroma cocoa from Sambirano — premium niche. Strong agroecology focus (bio-fertilizers, bio-pesticides, crop association). SIDI partner since 2013.

portfolio.business_model: Cashew processing subsidiary of ECOOKIM, largest Fairtrade cocoa cooperative union in Ivory Coast
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Majority-owned by ECOOKIM cooperative union, which represents farmer cooperatives
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2023; processing capacity 10,000–15,000 tonnes. Climate resilience angle: cashew is drought-tolerant. Targets 10,000+ producers by 2025.

portfolio.business_model: Profile unavailable — server error during fetch
portfolio.analyst_notes: DATA GAP: SIDI profile page returned server error. Re-fetch recommended at next session.

portfolio.business_model: Multi-product cooperative processing rice, cassava, maize, tomatoes and bananas; AFD co-financed
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Cooperative model; fixed assets contributed by cooperative members
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded 2015; 8 processing units nationwide; ~€280,000 annual sales. AFD co-investor alongside SIDI. 90% of Burundian population employed in agriculture.

portfolio.business_model: Organic cashew and dried mango processor; manual processing to maximise local employment
portfolio.analyst_notes: Subsidiary of Swiss Gebana AG. Manual processing retained deliberately to create jobs — one of largest employers in Bobo-Dioulasso. Security/climate risk in Burkina Faso flagged by SIDI.

portfolio.business_model: SME developing and promoting organic market through biopesticides, biofertilizers and organic marketing
portfolio.key_products: Biopesticides, bio-fertilizers, organic market garden produce, sesame
portfolio.analyst_notes: Founded with R&D focus; combines input supply with market valorisation of organic products. Target: 10,000 producers by 2030. 50% women beneficiaries. Parallel to Garbaliser (both bioinput SMEs serving smallholders).

portfolio.business_model: Organic and fair trade Arabica coffee cooperative; among world's most renowned coffees
portfolio.farmer_owned_notes: Farmer-owned cooperative (4,000+ producers, 42% women)
portfolio.analyst_notes: Operating since 2009; conflict-affected region. Second payment at end of season + Fairtrade premiums. 42% women — high for conflict-affected DRC context. Parallel to CPNCK (same region, same buyer network).
